creator: tijl@coosemans.org
text:
Hi,

After a bit more testing I noticed the above patch has problems
when MASTER_SITES is empty or has comments.

I've attached three separate patches to fix these issues.

*portlint-1.patch*

The code in the second chunk of this patch removes comment lines
before joining lines with backslashes. This means a line with a
backslash is joined with the line after the comment, which is wrong.

The fix is in the first chunk of the patch. Join all lines with a
backslash before doing anything else.

*portlint-2.patch*

When looping over URLs in MASTER_SITES, simply stop as soon as a
comment character is encountered.

*portlint-3.patch*

Detect plain ftp/http sites and print a warning if none have been
found.
